title: ACRORHAGI
copy: Hardware systems layer for individual compute security and interaction optimisations — first principles design drawing from biological systems.

detail.summary: ACRORHAGI is the hardware systems layer — bio-inspired compute designed from first principles. The architecture draws from biological systems that have solved distributed processing, fault tolerance, and adaptive IO over evolutionary timescales.
points: Custom hardware platforms running DePtH OS natively
Tentacular IO: adaptive multi-channel input/output, much like cnidarian nervous systems
Topologies with graceful degradation and secure compartmentalisation — resilient against catastrophic failures
Currently in limited but active prototype development
detail.relations: Runs DePtH OS as its native operating substrate. Connects through ACONTIA mesh. Platform page serves as the access point for ACRORHAGI systems. Sovereign OS: DePtH OS. Network: ACONTIA.

title: DePtH OS
copy: Self-sovereign operating substrate — coordinating hardware, software, and social stacks on bonded devices.

detail.summary: DePtH OS is a custom operating system distro targeting builds on Rust-native Redox OS, with Linux currently being ported and developed as the native OS MVP for ACRORHAGI hardware. Beyond the safe kernel developments, DePtH OS uses tRust-constrained security processes and includes purpose-built applications to serve as core Metridium ecosystem infrastructure.
points: Building on Linux for fast and open MVP systems development
Targeting custom Redox OS distro design for high security and micro-kernel level security layers built with tRust verifiable language systems
Individual self-sovereignty by design — kernel and OS artifacts never leave bonded hardware
Purpose-built applications under active development as core ecosystem infrastructure
detail.relations: Runs natively on ACRORHAGI hardware. Hosts Amphiprion and tRust as core integrated services. Communicates through ACONTIA mesh and MetridiumPHV. Hardware systems: ACRORHAGI. Trust layer: tRust. Network: ACONTIA.

title: tRust
copy: Compiler-enforced Rust dialect for deterministic, verifiable state machines — authorization, invariants, and system correctness guaranteed by construction.

detail.summary: tRust is a compiler-enforced Rust dialect for building deterministic, verifiable state machines with explicit state, transitions, and authority. It makes authorization, invariants, and system correctness first-class, enforcing them at compile time and runtime. All execution is bounded, reproducible, and inspectable through a structured intermediate representation (TIR). The result is a language for designing systems where integrity and validity are guaranteed by construction.
points: Compiler-enforced state machines with explicit transitions and authority
Authorization, invariants, and correctness verified at compile time and runtime
All execution is bounded, reproducible, and inspectable through TIR
Integrity and validity guaranteed by construction — not by audit
detail.relations: Serves as the language-level integrity infrastructure intertwined with all service accountability. Sovereign OS: DePtH OS. Network: ACONTIA. Blockchain: MetridiumPHV. Identity: MyDID + PHREE.id.

title: ACONTIA
copy: Secure mesh network layer — physical hardware, software infrastructure, and sovereign developments woven into a resilient, adaptive fabric.

detail.summary: ACONTIA is the network mesh that unifies physical hardware, software infrastructure like tRust, and sovereign developments like DePtH OS and Amphiprion into a cohesive, adaptive fabric. Named after the defensive filaments of sea anemones, it provides secure, zero-trust routing between sovereign devices — ensuring every node, every service, and every data flow is verified and encrypted by default.
points: Zero-trust architecture: every connection verified, nothing assumed safe
Adaptive routing that responds to network conditions and threat landscapes
Carries tRust-verified identity and PHREE.id credentials at the mesh layer
Encrypted content delivery for private utility, public services, and sovereign compute
detail.relations: The connective tissue between ACRORHAGI hardware, DePtH OS instances, tRust verification, Amphiprion data sovereignty, and PHREE.id identity. Secured by MetridiumPHV blockchain operations and empowering Ane.moneY economy platforms. Value flows through the mesh across all layers.

title: MetridiumPHV
copy: Independent network blockchain empowering the ACONTIA compute mesh — participation-verified hybrid consensus for coordinated value, governance, and verifiable proofs.

detail.summary: MetridiumPHV is an independent network blockchain empowering the ACONTIA compute mesh. As the blockchain substrate it performs critical verification roles as a hybrid chain for participation-verified consensus rather than extractive mining. It provides the immutable ledger layer for value coordination, compute resource networking, and verifiable proofs that the broader ecosystem depends on. PHREE.id identity is enforced natively on-chain.
points: Participation-verified consensus: contribution rather than extraction
Hybrid architecture supporting both private and public chain segments
PHREE.id identity enforced natively on the chain layer
Operational substrate for compute resource networking and transparent proofs
detail.relations: Operational substrate empowering the ACONTIA mesh. Anchored by tRust attestation. Feeds transaction integrity to ANE.moneY economic coordination, as well as participatory network compute and storage resources. Natively enforces PHREE.id identity credentials.

title: Ane.moneY
copy: ANE ecosystem: participation-based distributed value coordination system — economic infrastructure for genuine utility, not speculation.

detail.summary: ANE is the economic coordination layer — a participation-based value system designed to sustain Metridium initiatives without relying on extractive financial models, while growing into a broader value ecosystem. Anemone yield represents the return generated through genuine utility and participation rather than speculation, while Ane.moneY is the infrastructure platform for interactions.
points: Distributed value coordination: participants contribute and benefit proportionally
Designed for self-sustaining economic infrastructure
Integrates with MetridiumPHV for transparent ledger operations
Building toward economic independence for the entire Metridium ecosystem and network compute
detail.relations: Flows across ACONTIA mesh. Settles through MetridiumPHV. Provides the economic engine for all Metridium initiatives and network compute.

title: AMPHIPRION
copy: Privacy-first, multi-agent AI database platform — orchestrating LLMs, encrypted vaults, and autonomous agents with monetizable data ownership and powerful automation.

detail.summary: Amphiprion — named after the genus of anemone fish — is a privacy-first, multi-agent AI supported database platform that runs on your own hardware and through secure network resources, enforcing user self-sovereignty through monetizable data ownership and powerful automation capabilities. It orchestrates local LLMs, encrypted vaults, and autonomous agents across an ACRORHAGI–ACONTIA device mesh. Built as a core DePtH OS integrated application environment.
points: Can run entirely on your own hardware — no cloud dependency required
Orchestrates local LLMs, cloud LLM resources, local network encrypted vaults, and autonomous agents
Advanced security protocols, layered encryption, and isolated processes
Full self-sovereign control over your data and AI infrastructure in a securely unified environment
detail.relations: Core DePtH OS integrated application. Operates across ACRORHAGI hardware connected via ACONTIA mesh. Leverages the full sovereign stack for data and AI sovereignty. Feeds cumulative knowledge into personal RemeMnemosyne systems.

title: Risc OSINT
copy: Intelligence analysis platform and framework for semi-public community intelligence — systematic observation, correlation, and pattern recognition across open-source information.

detail.summary: Risc OSINT is the intelligence analysis layer — a platform and framework for semi-public community intelligence, systematically gathering, correlating, and deriving actionable patterns from open-source information. Designed to serve Metridium's research and infrastructure decisions with verified, attributable intelligence, while providing publicly available, clean and verified information streams. Utilising and in awe of projects like GDELT.
points: Systematic collection and correlation of open-source intelligence
Pattern recognition across diverse information landscapes
Verification and attribution through MyDID and open-source signals
Designed to inform strategic decisions across the Metridium ecosystem
detail.relations: Verifies sources through MyDID and open-source signals. Correlates economic signals to Ane.moneY. Network compute through MetridiumPHV and ACONTIA.

title: RemeMnemosyne
copy: High-performance agentic memory engine — unified memory coordination at scale, semantic search across millions of records, and turbo-compressed vector retrieval.

detail.summary: RemeMnemosyne — named after the Greek goddess of memory — is being developed as a high-performance agentic memory engine built for better overviews of personalised data ownership, and provides LLM agents unified memory coordination at scale. It was engineered to remove hard limitations on event storage and deliver semantic search across millions of records. Memory is not a feature; it is critical core architecture.
points: Multi-modal memory system spanning semantic, episodic, graph, and temporal memory types
TurboQuant compression engine delivering 8x vector compression via Product Quantization and Polar Quantization
Sub-millisecond micro-embeddings with HNSW approximate nearest-neighbour search for rapid context retrieval
Pure Rust core by default — scales from embedded single-agent use to large-scale multi-system permissioned intelligence pipelines
detail.relations: Feeds Amphiprion's AI agents with cumulative knowledge. Preserves identity context from PHREE.id. Persists across ACONTIA mesh.

title: MyDID.ORG + PHREE.id
copy: Self-sovereign identity enforced natively by MetridiumPHV blockchain — credentials for ecosystem interactions, data vaults, and compute/storage mesh access.

detail.summary: PHREE.id is the verified identity system enforced natively by MetridiumPHV blockchain. It allows interfacing with network compute and storage for self-sovereign data, serves as a credential for any full ecosystem interaction, and provides outside utility such as data vaults. PHREE.id also validates and enables the compute and storage mesh system as part of ACONTIA.
points: PHREE.id: verified identity enforced natively on MetridiumPHV blockchain
Self-sovereign data vaults accessible through identity credentials
Credential for full ecosystem interactions — compute, storage, mesh access
MyDID.ORG stewards the broader mission: identity as a fundamental human right
Validating and enabling ACONTIA's compute and storage mesh
detail.relations: Enforced natively by MetridiumPHV. Verified by tRust at the compile-time and runtime layer. Serves as credential gateway for ACONTIA mesh participation. Informs Risc OSINT analysis and RemeMnemosyne memory persistence.

title: values.capital
copy: Institutional capital formation vehicles — raising and deploying resources without extractive expectations, structured for specific directions of social innovation and infrastructure building.

detail.summary: values.capital and RIS.capital are two arms making up the institutional capital formation vehicles adjacent to, and integrating with, the Metridium ecosystem. Capital is treated as a tool for building sustainable infrastructure for specific directions of social innovation, not as an instrument of control.
points: Capital raised without equity dilution or extractive monetary expectations
Commitment aligned with milestone delivery and demonstrated progress
Feeds directly into ANE.moneY economic coordination and ACRORHAGI hardware development
Structured to preserve sovereignty — investors are mission participants, not rent-seekers
detail.relations: Provides the capital formation layer that funds ACRORHAGI hardware R&D and DePtH OS development. Settlement inside and outside of MetridiumPHV for transparent ledger operations. Flows into ANE.moneY as the economic coordination engine. Operates across ACONTIA mesh.
